creator: support@sfedu.ru
text:
Hello.
I've tested this patch and approve it. Thanks to Phil for helping this 
stub port better.

On 08/22/2011 22:50, Edwin Groothuis wrote:
> Maintainer of databases/postgresql-repmgr,
>
> Please note that PR ports/160008 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.



--

脨聬脨禄脨碌脨潞脩聛脨掳脨陆脨麓脩聙 脨聼脩聥脩聟脨掳脨禄脨戮脨虏,
脩聛脨赂脩聛脩聜脨碌脨录脨陆脩聥脨鹿 脨掳脨麓脨录脨赂脨陆脨赂脩聛脩聜脩聙脨掳脩聜脨戮脩聙 脨庐脨聯脨聵脨聺脨陇脨聻 脨庐脨陇脨拢.
